comment: Hard capability requirements per app, keyed by SHORT app id (the apps/<id>/ segment). The shell consults this before mounting (openHolospaceApp): if a required capability is absent on the visitor's machine, it renders holo-requires.fallbackDoc — a calm LABELED card — instead of mounting an app that would blank or throw. Kept OS-side and decoupled from the apps repo (like core-surfaces.json) so adding/adjusting a requirement needs no per-app relock. Capabilities: webgpu | opfs | sab | storage | threads. List ONLY hard requirements — if an app degrades gracefully on its own, leave it out. holo-cold-app-witness.mjs reads this to witness each declared app under real capability stripping.
